---
title: "Exploration of Qualitative Responses and Missing Data"
format: html
editor: visual
code-tools: TRUE
code-fold: TRUE
embed-resources: TRUE
params: 
  src_d: "../Code/R"
  data_d: "../Data/"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: FALSE

library("conflicted", quietly = TRUE)
library("magrittr", include.only = c("%<>%","%>%"),
        quietly = TRUE)
library("tidyverse", include.only = c() , quietly = TRUE)
library("gt",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("broom",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("patchwork",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("labelled",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
```

```{r}
#| label: read-raw-data

responses_raw.df <- readr::read_csv(
  file.path(params[["data_d"]], "/Rhetorics_recoded_survey_data_260318.csv"), 
            col_names=FALSE, skip=3, guess_max=Inf,                        
            show_col_types = FALSE

)

responses_labels.df <- readr::read_csv(
  file.path(params[["data_d"]], "/Rhetorics_recoded_survey_data_260318.csv"), 
            col_names=TRUE, skip=, guess_max=Inf, n_max=2,
            show_col_types = FALSE
)

names(responses_raw.df) <- names(responses_labels.df)

labelled::var_label(responses_raw.df) <- 
  dplyr::coalesce(
    responses_labels.df[1,] %>% t() %>% as.vector(),
    names(responses_raw.df)
    )

rm(responses_labels.df)
```

```{r}
responses_raw.df %>% dplyr::select(c("comments",
  names(responses_raw.df) %>% 
  stringr::str_subset("_TEXT$"))) %>% View()

names(responses_raw.df)

```
